primary_diagnosis:
Plasma cell leukemia with multiple myeloma IgG Kappa, stage III A per Salmon and
Durie, ID 01/2012
question: Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
tumor_board_decision:
No variant on NGS. t(11;14) in current FISH findings. Therefore, Venetoclax-based
therapy recommended.
raw_vignette:
Age: 64
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnoses:
Plasma cell leukemia with multiple myeloma IgG Kappa, stage III A per Salmon and
Durie, ID 01/2012
Secondary diagnoses / Comorbidities:
History of Appendectomy
Allergies: Hay fever
Prognostic factors:
Initial: 2,6 mg/l; Albumin 33,1 g/l; ISS II
Cytogenetics (09/12): No High-risk genetics.
Treatment and course:
Molecular genetic findings
FISH findings:
Deletion 1q21 (22%) and 13q14 (20%), Gain 11q22.3 (34%, three copies),
IgH-Rearrangement (33%) as Translocation t(11;14) (36%) Incidentally Deletion 14q32
(35%).
Question for the tumor board:
Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
Tumor board decision:
No variant on NGS. t(11;14) in current FISH findings. Therefore, Venetoclax-based
therapy recommended.
